releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature/Confetti Celebration & Sidebar Enhancements (#31)**

- **Confetti Animation on Task Completion**: A fun new confetti animation plays when all tasks are completed.
- **Sidebar – More Confetti Styles**: Added multiple confetti styles for variety.
- **Setting – Toggle Confetti**: New setting added to enable or disable confetti celebrations.

**Style/Highlights**

- **Due Date Highlighting**: Sidebar now highlights past due dates only for tasks that are not started.

**Bug Fixes**

- **fix(sidebar)**: Fixed an issue where the line-through style for completed tasks was not applying correctly.

**Chore & Refactor**

- **chore(clean)**: General code cleanup and maintenance.
releases.name: v1.4.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Feature/Create Task & Sidebar Improvements (#29)
- **API:** New endpoint to create tasks with an optional `dueDate`.  
- **Sidebar – Edit on Double‑Click:** Double‑click any task line in the sidebar to pop open the edit modal (title & due date).  
- **Sidebar – Loading Spinner:** Show a spinner while tasks are fetching.  
- **Sidebar – Toggle Icons:** Different icons for expanded vs. collapsed task groups.  
- **Sidebar – Completed at Bottom:** Completed tasks now always float to the bottom of the list.

### Style/Highlights
- **Due‑Date Color Coding:** Tasks due **Today** or **Tomorrow** are now highlighted in distinct colors for quick recognition.

### Bug Fixes
- **fix(main):** Corrected the Microsoft Graph payload in `updateTask()` so that status, title, and due‑date updates are sent properly.  
- **fix(action):** Refined the GitHub Actions release workflow to trigger on **both** `push` and `pull_request.closed` events—but **only** when `manifest.json` changes—preventing unnecessary runs on unrelated commits.

### Chore & Refactor
- **chore(clean):** General code cleanup and organization.  
- **refactor(style):** Moved all CSS into a dedicated stylesheet for clearer separation.
releases.name: v1.4.2

releases.name: v1.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature/Toggle Complete (#23)**

- **Toggle Completed Tasks**: You can now hide or show completed tasks to keep your workspace clean and focused on what’s left to do.
- **Refreshed Sidebar Structure**: The sidebar container and navigation header have been reorganized for better readability and quick access to actions.
- **Improved Task Display**: The selected task list name is now displayed above tasks, making it clearer which list you’re managing.
- **Bug Fixes**:  
  - Fixed an issue where adding a new task inserted it at the top of the list.  
  - Corrected a naming conflict with Chinese characters.  
- **Code Cleanup**: Various chores and cleanups were done to keep the codebase organized.
releases.name: v1.2.0
